name: CTXL Personal Context MCP Server
what_it_does: Personal context management MCP server from Autoblocks AI — enabling AI assistants to store, retrieve, and manage personal context for more personalized and consistent interactions. Allows AI agents to remember preferences, facts, and patterns about users across sessions through a context management layer.
use_cases: Storing personal preferences and facts for AI assistants to reference across sessions
Managing context that makes AI interactions more consistent and personalized
Building personal AI assistant memory using Autoblocks context management
Enabling cross-session context persistence for AI productivity workflows
not_for: Teams needing full vector database memory (use ChromaDB, Pinecone MCPs)
Teams not using Autoblocks AI platform
best_when: An individual or team using Autoblocks AI wants AI assistants to maintain consistent personal context across interactions — improving personalization through structured context management.
avoid_when: You need enterprise-scale memory management or full vector search. For simple persistence, consider existing memory tools. Autoblocks is a paid platform.

auth.notes: Autoblocks AI API key required. Autoblocks account needed for context storage.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Autoblocks free tier for context storage
pricing.paid_tiers: Paid tiers for higher volume and team use
pricing.notes: Autoblocks AI freemium. MCP server is official from autoblocksai org.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Personal context stored in Autoblocks cloud — review their data privacy terms
Context staleness can occur — implement expiry or refresh mechanisms
Official from autoblocksai org — better quality than community alternatives
Autoblocks platform dependency — tied to their pricing and availability
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Personal context data stored in Autoblocks cloud. Review data processing terms. API key security. HTTPS to Autoblocks API.

security_score_components.security_notes: Personal context stored in cloud. Data privacy terms review needed. HTTPS. API key security.
